svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="代开生命周期时序" id="lifecycle"> <mxGraphModel dx="-584" dy="-222" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="820" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="h_op" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="运营/平台" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="120" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h_be" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="SaaS 后端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="120" x="270" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h_wx" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="微信开放平台" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="140" x="500" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h_audit" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="微信审核" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="120" x="730" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h_mini" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="租户小程序" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="120" x="940" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll_op" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="120" y="76" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="120" y="720" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll_be" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="330" y="76" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="330" y="720" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll_wx" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="570" y="76" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="720" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll_audit" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="790" y="76" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="790" y="720" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll_mini" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1000" y="76" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1000" y="720" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ll_op" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="ll_be" value="1. 生成预授权 URL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="120" y="110" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="330" y="110" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" value="2. 创建预授权码 / 拉授权 URL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="330" y="140" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="140" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" value="3. 租户扫码授权平台代管"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="120" y="175" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="175" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;dashed=1;" value="4. (可选)代注册:企业资料 → 注册小程序"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="330" y="220" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="220" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" value="5. /wxa/commit 提交模板 + ext_json(tenantId)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="330" y="270" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="270" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;align=left;" value="版本号自增
1.0.3 → 1.0.4" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="110" x="600" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" value="6. /wxa/submit_audit"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="330" y="335" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="335" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" value="7. 进审核队列"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="570" y="365" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="790" y="365" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s8" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" value="8. 审核通过 / 驳回"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="790" y="405" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="330" y="405" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s9" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" value="9. /wxa/release 发布"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="330" y="450" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s10" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" value="10. 上线,租户可用"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="570" y="490" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1000" y="490" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb1" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;dashed=1;" value="回滚:查历史模板 → 重新 commit + 发布"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="330" y="565" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1000" y="565" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;align=left;" value="出事故时走这条
按版本号回退" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="120" x="600" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exp1" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;dashed=1;" value="体验版:set体验版 + 拉二维码"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="330" y="640" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1000" y="640" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="图例" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="50" x="60" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_main" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;" value="主流程"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="120" y="700" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="170" y="700" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_opt" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;dashed=1;" value="可选 / 体验版"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="700" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="700" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_rb" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;dashed=1;" value="回滚"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="360" y="700" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="410" y="700" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
